title: Vinsani Set of 3 Reusable Fabric Recycling Bags – Colour-Coded Durable Spacious Organiser Efficient Waste Sorting Home Office Kitchen for Glass Plastic and Paper Recycling
features: LARGE STORAGE CAPACITY: Each of the three bags offers a spacious 40L capacity, giving you ample room to neatly organise all your recyclables, including glass, plastic, and paper. Perfect for managing household waste without cluttering your kitchen, the large size ensures less frequent trips to the recycling bins.

DURABLE MATERIAL: Made from sturdy polyethylene, these bags are designed to withstand daily use and ensure long-lasting performance. The material is washable, making it easy to maintain cleanliness and reuse the bags over time.

COLOUR-CODED DESIGN: Each bag is clearly colour-coded—green for glass, yellow for plastic, and blue for paper—making it simple to sort recyclables at a glance. The bright, bold colours help you keep your kitchen organised and ensure that recycling is an easy and efficient part of your daily routine.

EASY TO CARRY: Designed with strong, durable carry handles, each bag allows you to easily transport recyclables to your nearest recycling point. The sturdy handles ensure a secure grip, even with heavy loads, making the process convenient and hassle-free.

ATTACHABLE BAGS FOR ORGANISATION: The bags can be clipped together to form a freestanding recycling station that keeps your kitchen tidy and well-organised. When attached, they remain stable and upright, making it easy to sort your waste while saving space. Each bag measures H44 x W31 x D30 cm, providing a practical solution for any home.
description: Product Description The Vinsani Set of 3 Reusable Fabric Recycling Bags offers a simple yet effective solution for waste management for outdoor and indoor, this set makes recycling an effortless part of your daily routine. Sturdy Handle These reinforced handles make it easy to carry even heavy loads of recyclables without the worry of tearing or discomfort. Waterproof PVC Ensures that any accidental spills or moisture from glass bottles, plastic containers, or food waste won’t seep through, keeping your environment clean and dry. Hook and Loop Located on the sides of each bag, allowing you to easily attach the bags together, creating a stable and organized recycling station. Foldable Storage Bag Each bag can be quickly fold, allowing you to place under cupboard, or storage space without taking up too much room. 3 Pcs With this 3-piece set, you’ll have everything you need to create a well-organised recycling station, whether at home, in the office, or in a kitchen setting. Three Colours These 3 pcs are colour-coded for easy identification which helps ensure proper recycling and makes it simple to separate your recyclables. Spacious and Durable Each of the three bags is spacious, durable. Constructed from tough, high-quality materials, ensuring long-lasting use. Dimensions Approximately 44 cm (height) x 31 cm (width) x 30 cm (depth). These dimensions are designed to accommodate a large volume of recyclables. Say goodbye to disorganised recycling areas and welcome a more efficient, clean, and organised system with these Vinsani bags, ideal for any home, office, or kitchen. A must have home essential Vinsani Set of 3 Reusable Fabric Recycling Bags is an essential investment for anyone looking to enhance their recycling efforts while maintaining a clean and organised space. With their spacious and durable design, these bags can easily handle a variety of recyclables, from glass bottles to cardboard boxes, ensuring you have the capacity to manage your waste effectively.
